caption: A person's hands are shown working on a white gridded cutting mat placed on a light-colored wooden surface. A square piece of light blue paper is centered on the mat. The person, wearing a ring on their left ring finger, uses both hands to smooth and press down the blue paper. In the sequence, the left hand remains relatively steady on the left edge of the paper, while the right hand moves across the top and right sides, applying pressure to secure the paper to the surface. To the left of the mat is a decorative card featuring a floral design and the text "d YOU LITTLE Leluide Cheer You warm my heart". A white marker lies horizontally above the mat. The logo "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
